cluster.title: Chat Surface — Core (shell, canvas, composer, ports)
cluster.summary: The substrate-agnostic SSOT interaction layer both web and desktop mount: ChatShell + Run-cockpit ThreadCanvas + composer + citation/subagent/approval/workspace families + Settings surface, all behind a typed ports contract (Transport/Router/KeyValueStore/SecretStorage/Presence/Palette/etc.) with an eslint-enforced browser-primitive ban. Architecture is disciplined and well unit-tested, but no CI runs its lint/tests, the 'one event projection' cockpit invariant has forked (second SSE in TcSwimlanes, mostly-dead projector slices), and several acknowledged duplications (depth models, subagent reducers, aui CSS, legacy web Settings) await convergence.

nodes.summary: 1,269-line phase-blocked public barrel; hosts consume only through it (main/types both point at src/index.ts).
The substrate contract: Transport/Router/KeyValueStore/SecretStorage/PresenceSignal/SurfaceHost/Badge/Notification/FilePicker/Clipboard/PaletteSearch ports; contract-tested re-export facade.
React context per port (strict Transport/Router/DeploymentProfile; tolerant KV/Secret/Presence) + NotificationCenter toast SSOT.
Web reference implementations via globalThis convention: LocalStorageKeyValueStore, WebSecretStorage (dev-grade), DocumentPresenceSignal, HashRouter.
Router<TRoute> port, ArtifactRoute union, artifact-URI schemes/parser, HashRouter web impl; ROUTE_TABLE is stub vestige.
ChatShell grid + AppRail/Topbar/ContextPanel/RightRail + primitives + the destinations SSOT (slug/label/profile rail) and shortcuts SSOT (12 chords) + CommandPalette.
Single-mount Run cockpit canvas: eventProjector + TcChat + TcSwimlanes + TcMiniTimeline + TcSurfaceMount + TcInlineDiff; modes are presentation slots, never remounts.
Canonical run resolver + cursor-resumed SSE tail owner (exported through the barrel; file lives under destinations/run, shared scope with chat-surface-destinations).
Composer (1.6k LOC) + AssistantComposer shell + model/tool/depth pickers + composer.css; two coexisting depth models and hardcoded model lists.
Streamdown-based streaming markdown, citation href helpers + remark plugin, reasoning groups.
Citation context/chips/Sources surfaces + pure citation/link registries (the converged family — web host wraps these reducers).
Subagent/fleet cards + projectSubagents pure selector; subagentHelpers reproduces the web host's chatModel/subagentStatus.ts.
Presentational ApprovalCard/Receipt/undo-countdown; decision wiring stays host-owned.
Right-rail WorkspacePane + five tab bodies; boundary types structurally mirror host hooks (deferred convergence).
Module-singleton SaaS renderer adapter registry (version-sorted, broken-marking), pure-render adapter contract (D28), Tier2Loader, tier-3 GenericStructuredDiff.
ItemLink + module-singleton ItemRef resolver registry — one resolution path for palette hits and inline refs.
SettingsSurface + settingsNav SSOT + 12 section bodies + Transport-backed provider-keys/developer-tokens port factories (desktop mounts it; web still on legacy SettingsScreen).
parseTransportError/humanTransportMessage (facade envelope + Electron IPC prefix recovery) and formatRelativeTime SSOT.

edges.label: branded IDs / ItemRef / wire types re-exported from @0x-copilot/api-types
TcSwimlanes' second uncursored subscription to the same run stream (FR-3.3 violation)
web host mounts ChatShell + port impls + wraps reducers (106 importing files)
desktop renderer mounts ChatShell/SettingsSurface, drives Tier2 registerAdapter
deep CSS imports (composer.css, workspace.css) — the one barrel exception
destinations consume shell primitives, ports/providers, families, util/time
surface-renderers registers tier-1 adapters into SurfaceRegistry
TcSurfaceMount resolves adapters (100ms budget, tier-3 fallback)
CommandPalette entity hits navigate via the ItemLink resolver registry
ci-desktop path filter + release-desktop bundle inline; NO job runs package lint/tests
